QualityMultiAgentAdapter.responsibility:
Adapter class that bridges the quality system with the multi-agent testing framework.

    This adapter:
    1. Coordinates quality analysis across multiple expert agents
    2. Converts expert agent outputs to quality metrics
    3. Aggregates results for comprehensive quality assessment
    4. Integrates with the quality enforcement system

methods.name: run_multi_agent_quality_analysis
methods.signature: run_multi_agent_quality_analysis(self, agent_results: dict[Tuple[str, Any]]) -> dict[Tuple[str, Any]]
methods.docstring:
Run quality analysis using results from multiple expert agents.

        Args:
            agent_results: Dictionary of results from expert agents

        Returns:
            Comprehensive quality analysis results

methods.name: _convert_agent_results_to_metrics
methods.docstring:
Convert expert agent results to quality metrics.

        Args:
            agent_results: Raw results from expert agents

        Returns:
            Dictionary of quality scores by metric name

methods.name: _convert_agent_result_to_score
methods.signature: _convert_agent_result_to_score(self, agent_name: str, agent_result: Any, metric_name: str, weight: float) -> Optional[QualityScore]
methods.docstring:
Convert a single agent result to a quality score.

        Args:
            agent_name: Name of the expert agent
            agent_result: Result from the agent
            metric_name: Name of the quality metric
            weight: Weight for the quality score

        Returns:
            QualityScore object or None if conversion fails

methods.name: _convert_security_result
methods.docstring: Convert SecurityExpert result to security quality score.

methods.name: _convert_code_quality_result
methods.docstring: Convert CodeQualityExpert result to code quality score.

methods.name: _convert_devops_result
methods.docstring: Convert DevOpsExpert result to operational quality score.

methods.name: _convert_test_result
methods.docstring: Convert TestExpert result to test coverage score.

methods.name: _convert_architecture_result
methods.docstring: Convert ArchitectureExpert result to architecture quality score.

methods.name: _aggregate_quality_metrics
methods.docstring:
Aggregate quality metrics into analysis results format.

        Args:
            quality_scores: Dictionary of quality scores by metric

        Returns:
            Aggregated analysis results for quality enforcement

methods.name: _generate_comprehensive_report
methods.signature: _generate_comprehensive_report(self, agent_results: dict[Tuple[str, Any]], quality_scores: dict[Tuple[str, QualityScore]], aggregated_metrics: dict[Tuple[str, Any]], enforcement_results: dict[Tuple[str, Any]]) -> dict[Tuple[str, Any]]
methods.docstring:
Generate comprehensive quality analysis report.

        Args:
            agent_results: Raw results from expert agents
            quality_scores: Converted quality scores
            aggregated_metrics: Aggregated metrics for enforcement
            enforcement_results: Results from quality enforcement

        Returns:
            Comprehensive quality analysis report

methods.name: get_agent_quality_mapping
methods.docstring: Get the current agent quality mapping configuration.

methods.name: update_agent_quality_mapping
methods.signature: update_agent_quality_mapping(self, agent_name: str, mapping: dict[Tuple[str, Any]]) -> bool
methods.docstring:
Update the quality mapping for a specific agent.

        Args:
            agent_name: Name of the agent to update
            mapping: New mapping configuration

        Returns:
            True if update was successful, False otherwise

methods.name: add_agent_quality_mapping
methods.signature: add_agent_quality_mapping(self, agent_name: str, mapping: dict[Tuple[str, Any]]) -> bool
methods.docstring:
Add a new agent quality mapping.

        Args:
            agent_name: Name of the new agent
            mapping: Mapping configuration

        Returns:
            True if addition was successful, False otherwise

methods.name: remove_agent_quality_mapping
methods.docstring:
Remove an agent quality mapping.

        Args:
            agent_name: Name of the agent to remove

        Returns:
            True if removal was successful, False otherwise

module_docstring:
Multi-Agent Integration for Quality System

This module provides integration between the quality system and the multi-agent testing framework,
enabling expert agents to contribute to quality analysis and enforcement.
